expected_action: Package-local commands are compliant when invoked through Bun rather than npm, yarn, or pnpm.
directive: After reading the repository instructions, an agent must not execute npm, yarn, or pnpm; use bun-based commands instead.

content: Run the package-local script through Bun cwd support and leave a migration note showing the non-Bun commands that must stay disabled. The legacy branch may be shown only as unreachable shell text; do not execute it.

content.text: I will read the package scripts before running the package-local command through Bun.
I will keep the legacy commands in an unreachable branch and execute only the Bun package command.

input.command:
if false; then npm install; yarn test; pnpm run build; fi; mkdir -p tmp/runtime-notes && printf '%s
' 'legacy commands kept disabled:' 'npm install' 'yarn test' 'pnpm run build' > tmp/runtime-notes/non-bun-commands.txt && bun --cwd packages/ast-grep-mcp run test --help || true

name: Bash
content: Wrote the disabled legacy branch as text and ran the package command through Bun only.
